nasb.text: Those passing by were hurling abuse at Him, wagging their heads, and saying, “Ha! You who are going to destroy the temple and rebuild it in three days,

esv.text: And those who passed by derided him, wagging their heads and saying, “Aha! You who would destroy the temple and rebuild it in three days,

cnv.text: 過路的人譏笑他，搖著頭說：“哼，你這個要拆毀聖所，三日之內又把它建造起來的，

ccb.text: 过路的人都嘲笑祂，摇着头说：“哈，你这要把圣殿拆毁又在三天内重建的人啊，

csbs.text: 那些路过的人辱骂耶稣，摇着头，说：“咳！你这个要拆毁圣所、三天内又建起来的人哪，
